responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete the IVX IA chat module end-to-end, fix the Expo Go "Something went wrong" crash, AND fix the fake deployment narrative bug where IVX IA returned placeholder proof values like "[AUTO-GENERATED]" and "[CURRENT SHA]"

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public)
- Backend live at `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- **IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER STANDARD**: every completed task must include 12-point evidence (root cause, files changed, commands, typecheck, build, test, runtime, commit SHA, deployment ID, production verification, blockers, what cannot be verified)
- Never mark LOCAL ONLY work as production complete; distinguish local/production/device verification
- User demands: no placeholders, no narrative templates, no success claims without real tool execution evidence
- Deployment state machine required: REQUESTEDŌåÆCODE_CHANGEDŌåÆTYPECHECK_PASSEDŌåÆTESTS_PASSEDŌåÆCOMMITTEDŌåÆPUSHEDŌåÆDEPLOY_TRIGGEREDŌåÆDEPLOY_SUCCEEDEDŌåÆPRODUCTION_VERIFIED
- Placeholder values ([AUTO-GENERATED], [CURRENT SHA], [placeholder], [pending], [unknown], [example]) must NEVER pass as valid proof
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key ŌĆö only Vercel access
- Workspace project ID `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` is Swift ŌĆö cannot preview React Native app from sandbox

## Progress
### Done
- **ALL 3 FAILs FIXED, DEPLOYED, AND VERIFIED LIVE IN PRODUCTION**:
  - FAIL#1 Socket.IO handshake: PASS (live HTTP 200) Ō£ģ
  - FAIL#2 Realtime round trip: PASS Ō£ģ
  - FAIL#3 Cross-store (realtimeŌåÆREST): PASS Ō£ģ
- **GitHub push completed** ŌĆö commit `3c617493ffe1103048c8628593b964a0bc6040fa` on `main` (shared chat store, proof flag, base36 deploy-ID, test fixes)
- **Second GitHub push completed** ŌĆö commit `d35db8b99cf4370e98e13564a8b8563ff43e458a` on `main` (TypeScript fixes: buffer-global.d.ts, enterprise-audit-log.tsx, tsconfig.json)
- **Render deploy completed** ŌĆö production `/version` + `/health` confirm commit `d35db8b9` live (HTTP 200)
- **Client test suite: 252/252 PASS, 0 FAIL** across 22 files
- **Backend test suite: 789/789 PASS, 0 FAIL** (after reinstalling `pdf-lib` and `ai` which were wiped by sandbox recycle)
- **TypeScript: 0 ERRORS** (was 155, then fixed):
  - `expo/types/buffer-global.d.ts` ŌĆö widened `IvxBufferLike` to extend `Uint8Array`, added `concat()` and overloaded `from()`
  - `expo/app/ivx/enterprise-audit-log.tsx:201` ŌĆö removed web-only `outline: 'none'`
  - `expo/tsconfig.json` ŌĆö added `e2e/**`, `backend/**`, `server.ts` to `exclude`
- **Production Android export: PASS** ŌĆö 20.9 MB Hermes bytecode, zero errors
- **Metro Android bundle: SUCCESS** ŌĆö 4,226 modules, ~40MB dev bundle, builds to 100% with zero errors
- **Expo Go SDK versions verified**: expo `~54.0.35`, react `19.1.0`, react-native `0.81.5`, expo-router `~6.0.24` ŌĆö all SDK 54, Expo Go compatible
- **Tunnel infrastructure audited and replaced**: localtunnel (`loca.lt`) retired (HTTP 503 mid-transfer); switched to Expo official `exp.direct` tunnel (HTTP 200 verified)
- **DEVICE VERIFICATION CONFIRMED VIA METRO LOGS** ŌĆö user's physical Android session captured:
  - App rendered: `[Home] boot {"authLoading": false, "isAuthenticated": true, "userRole": "owner"}`
  - Owner sign-in succeeded: `owner-access-repair` HTTP 200, `[Auth] State changed: SIGNED_IN`, user `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`, role `owner`
  - AI chat round trips: conversationId `8f5a9c42-1cb5-4f81-b2d8-6f3a0a8b9d41`, two user messages sent and answered, provider `openai/gpt-4o` via `vercel_ai_gateway`
  - Persistence: app backgroundedŌåÆresumedŌåÆrealtime resubscribed, second message delivered correctly
  - Zero runtime JS exceptions in Metro log
- **Fake deployment narrative root cause identified** ŌĆö the chat-model path (`public-chat-ai.ts` and the general owner-ai answer path) was NOT covered by the developer-execution guard (which only runs on routed development commands) or the senior-developer narrative gate (only applied on the public-chat path). The model generated fake "Deployment Proceeding", "Deployment Confirmation", "[AUTO-GENERATED]", "[CURRENT SHA]" templates without any real execution
- **New deployment claim gate module created**: `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` ŌĆö blocks placeholder proof values unconditionally, blocks fake deployment confirmations unless real evidence present, idempotent
- **Developer execution guard updated**: `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` ŌĆö added `PLACEHOLDER_PROOF_PATTERNS` and `findPlaceholderProofValues()` for unconditional placeholder rejection
- **Senior developer narrative gate updated**: `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` ŌĆö added forbidden markers for "Deployment Proceeding", "Deployment Confirmation", "[AUTO-GENERATED]", "[CURRENT SHA]", "The changes are live", "Health check passed"
- **Gate wired into universal choke point**: `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` now calls `applyDeploymentClaimGate()` before sanitization ŌĆö all 26 call sites pass through this gate
- **Test suite created**: `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.test.ts` ŌĆö regression tests on exact owner-reported responses, placeholder rejection, evidence-backed answer pass-through, idempotency

### In Progress
- **Deployment claim gate fix ŌĆö NOT YET COMPLETED through full policy sequence**: typecheck, tests, build, commit, push, deploy, production verification all still pending
- **Sandbox session instability** ŌĆö sandbox recycles periodically, wiping Metro/logs/tunnels/node_modules; each restart requires: `bun install`, disabling watchman, restarting tunnel + Metro

### Blocked
- **Cannot run Expo Go on Android from this sandbox** ŌĆö no Android emulator/device; user must do final device screenshot capture
- **Sandbox recycling kills dev server** ŌĆö Metro, tunnel, logs all wiped on session recycle; tunnel URLs change each time
- **Worker GitHub token still dead** ŌĆö Worker env holds revoked token ending QTOt; direct API push worked around this
- **Render API key exposed in chat**: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` should be rotated
- **`OPENAI_API_KEY` not available**: user confirmed no OpenAI key

## Key Decisions
- localtunnel (`loca.lt`) permanently retired ŌĆö replaced with Expo official `--tunnel` (ngrok/`exp.direct`)
- Watchman disabled (segfaults on this sandbox) ŌĆö rename `/usr/local/bin/watchman` to `.disabled` on every session restart
- `IvxBufferLike` extends `Uint8Array` to satisfy `crypto.createHash().update()` type constraint
- `tsconfig.json` excludes `backend/**`, `server.ts`, `e2e/**` ŌĆö server-only files are not part of the app typecheck
- Shared-store fix: single `ChatStorage` instance (`publicChatStorage`) from `backend/hono.ts` passed to `attachChatRealtime` in `server.ts`
- `endToEndProductionComplete` must be `false` for no-change passes ŌĆö phantom proofs eliminated
- `isRealDeployId` regex changed from hex `[0-9a-f]` to base36 `[0-9a-z]`
- Vercel AI Gateway KEPT ŌĆö user has $422 credits and working key `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6`
- GitHub OAuth device code flow used (client_id `178c6fc778ccc68e1d6a`); token at `/tmp/gh_token`
- **Deployment claim gate placed at `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` ŌĆö the single choke point all 26 answer paths pass through**, so no path can bypass it
- **Placeholder proof values rejected UNCONDITIONALLY** ŌĆö even when raw command output is present, a template slot is not evidence
- **Gate is idempotent** ŌĆö the blocked answer carries `IVX_DEPLOYMENT_CLAIM_GATE_MARKER` so it never re-triggers on itself

## Next Steps
1. **Run typecheck** on the deployment claim gate changes (`tsc --noEmit` for both expo and backend)
2. **Run full test suite** ŌĆö must include the new `ivx-deployment-claim-gate.test.ts` and verify no regressions in the 789 backend + 252 client tests
3. **Run production build** ŌĆö verify Android export still succeeds
4. **Commit and push to GitHub** ŌĆö new files: `ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts`, `ivx-deployment-claim-gate.test.ts`; modified: `ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts`, `ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts`, `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`
5. **Deploy to Render** and verify production `/health` returns HTTP 200 with new commit SHA
6. **Verify production** ŌĆö confirm GitHub HEAD = Render live commit
7. **Test in IVX Owner AI chat** ŌĆö send a deployment-related prompt and confirm the gate blocks fake narratives and returns real evidence or the honest NOT_DEPLOYED state
8. **User captures screenshot** of IVX IA returning real evidence without placeholders (proof N)
9. **Rotate Render API key** after all work complete

## Critical Context
- Production is LIVE and HEALTHY: commit `d35db8b9` matches GitHub/Render/`/version`/`/health` (HTTP 200) ŌĆö but the deployment claim gate fix is NOT yet deployed
- Metro Android bundle succeeds (4,226 modules, ~40MB) with zero errors
- Device verification was confirmed via Metro logs (not screenshots) ŌĆö app rendered, owner signed in, AI chat round-tripped, persistence worked
- The fake deployment narrative was generated by the chat model itself ŌĆö NOT by a hardcoded template in the codebase; the gate now intercepts and replaces it
- `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` is the universal choke point ŌĆö 26 call sites in `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` all pass through it
- `BLOCKED_VISIBLE_RESPONSE_PATTERNS` (line 143) already blocks internal markers; the deployment gate adds a second layer for fake deployment claims
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (ivx-holdings-platform)
- Current Expo tunnel URL changes on each session restart ŌĆö must regenerate and share with user each time
- Sandbox recycle recovery sequence: `bun install` ŌåÆ disable watchman ŌåÆ `expo start --tunnel --port 8081` ŌåÆ verify manifest HTTP 200 ŌåÆ warm bundle ŌåÆ share `exp.direct` URL
- Minor non-fatal warnings found in device session: stray text nodes on Home/Invest/Market tabs auto-wrapped by text-node-guard, `admin/lender-search.tsx` missing default export, JV-Audit broadcast `CHANNEL_ERROR`, two require cycles in `lib/parse-deal.ts` ŌĆö not yet fixed

## Relevant Files
- `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` ŌĆö NEW: deployment claim gate (placeholder rejection + fake confirmation blocking)
- `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.test.ts` ŌĆö NEW: regression tests for the gate
- `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` ŌĆö MODIFIED: added `PLACEHOLDER_PROOF_PATTERNS`, `findPlaceholderProofValues()`, unconditional placeholder rejection in `validateDeveloperExecutionAnswer()`
- `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` ŌĆö MODIFIED: added forbidden markers for deployment templates and placeholder values
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` ŌĆö MODIFIED: `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` now calls `applyDeploymentClaimGate()` before sanitization; added import
- `expo/app.config.ts` ŌĆö Expo config (SDK 54, plugins, scheme `ivx-app`)
- `expo/app/_layout.tsx` ŌĆö root layout (providers: Auth, I18n, Analytics, IPX, Email, Enterprise, CredentialVault)
- `expo/types/buffer-global.d.ts` ŌĆö ambient Buffer type (fixed: extends Uint8Array)
- `expo/app/ivx/enterprise-audit-log.tsx` ŌĆö fixed: removed web-only `outline: 'none'`
- `expo/tsconfig.json` ŌĆö fixed: excludes `backend/**`, `server.ts`, `e2e/**`
- `backend/hono.ts` ŌĆö exports `publicChatStorage` shared store
- `backend/chat-realtime.ts` ŌĆö accepts `sharedStorage?: ChatStorage` param
- `server.ts` ŌĆö passes `publicChatStorage` to `attachChatRealtime`
- `/tmp/gh_token` ŌĆö working GitHub OAuth token (may be wiped on recycle)
- `/tmp/metro.log` ŌĆö Metro output for runtime error capture (wiped on recycle)
